opportunities.description: India's biggest national hackathon solving product development and digital solutions problems. Highly recognized for VIT Bhopal students.

opportunities.description: A global program focused on bringing student developers into open-source software development. Work on computational data science or ML tools.

opportunities.title: IBM Data Science Professional Certificate
opportunities.description: Get started in Data Science with Python, SQL, data visualization, analysis, and machine learning. Excellent for 2nd year portfolio building.

opportunities.title: Kaggle Machine Learning & Deep Learning Micro-Courses

opportunities.title: ISRO Computational Science & Data Analytics Summer Internship

opportunities.description: Prestigious computational and space data analysis internship. Perfect match for Integrated M.Tech Computational and Data Science students.

opportunities.title: Hugging Face Deep RL and NLP Course
opportunities.description: Free, open-source course on Deep Reinforcement Learning and NLP using Transformers, Datasets, and Accelerate libraries. Ideal for AI specializations.

opportunities.title: Devpost Global AI & LLM Hackathon Series
opportunities.description: Build innovative AI/ML applications, agents, or models. Participate in global virtual hackathons with large cash prizes and networking.

opportunities.title: Unstop Data Science Hackathons & Hiring Challenges

opportunities.title: Major League Hacking (MLH) Hackathon Season
opportunities.description: The official student hackathon league. Compete in weekly global digital and in-person hackathons. Highly valuable for building developer portfolios.

opportunities.title: TCS CodeVita 2026 - Global Coding Contest
opportunities.description: One of the world's largest coding competitions for college students. Top performers secure direct interview invites for prime roles.

opportunities.title: Microsoft Imagine Cup 2026
opportunities.description: A global competition for student developers to build innovative technology projects using Microsoft Azure. Huge cash prizes and mentoring from industry leaders.

opportunities.title: Amazon ML Challenge 2026
opportunities.description: An annual competition designed to test machine learning modeling skills on real-world datasets. Top ranks get direct interview opportunities at Amazon.

opportunities.title: Google Girl Hackathon 2026
opportunities.description: A coding and system design challenge for female engineering students across India, designed to create a pipeline for internship and full-time hiring.

opportunities.title: Kaggle Active Data Science Competitions
opportunities.description: Solve challenging machine learning problems on real datasets. Gold/Silver medals are highly respected on resumes for Data Science roles.

opportunities.title: LeetCode Weekly & Biweekly Contests
